meta.title: Gwangsoo Choi
meta.description: Portfolio of Gwangsoo Choi - Product Builder ・ Software Engineer

hero.tagline: End-to-end ownership from planning to deployment — a driving force on any team

profile.name: Gwangsoo Choi
profile.bio0: Tokyo resident ({tokyoYears} years) — Korean product builder & software engineer with {careerYears} years of development experience.
profile.bio1: From large-scale system development teams to fast-paced startup product building — now serving as project owner and leader of a mobile app. In a two-person team with a design/UI/UX member, I drive product direction and lead all technical aspects.
profile.bio2: My broad coverage bridges gaps between team roles, enabling high momentum even in small teams. I actively leverage AI across engineering, planning, and design to deliver both quality and speed.
profile.bio3: I track signup and churn flows, monitor user behavior metrics, and detect errors in real time — driving product improvement through data-driven decisions.
profile.bio4: In team settings, close communication comes first — I value running toward goals together. By combining development principles refined through real-world experience with AI agents for code review, architecture validation, and design, I bring stable momentum and elevated quality to any team.
profile.bioSub: Also available for mid-to-long term freelance full-stack engineering contracts.

about.subtitle: Namseoul Univ. · Japanese Language School · Military  |  한국어 · 日本語 · English

highlights.title: Core Strengths
highlights.solo_desc: Hands-on experience across the entire service lifecycle — from planning to deployment and operations — with a deep understanding of business structure. Broad coverage bridges gaps between team roles, contributing to fast decision-making and efficient workflows.
highlights.ai_desc: I leverage AI agents across planning, design, and engineering to automate code reviews, architecture validation, and dev-design collaboration. This enables output at scale even in small teams — and creates even greater leverage within a larger team.
highlights.tech_desc: Experienced in both SI system development and startup product building. With a broad tech stack spanning backend, frontend, and mobile, I propose and implement the architecture best suited to each project's goals.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.ponge_desc: A location-based social app where LGBTQ+ users discover people nearby on the map and connect through real-time messaging and meetups. As project owner and leader, I drive product direction and technical execution in a two-person team with a design/UI/UX member. 6 languages + AI translation, map-based Shouting, B2B store registration, and Admin WebApp.
projects.hafh_desc: Designed, maintained, and implemented user plan, Admin, and On-call systems. Rails API backend development, Stripe subscription integration, and real-time OTA API sync.

philosophy.title: Development Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Development principles refined through real startup work enable consistent ownership from architecture to deployment. In team settings, I prioritize open communication and approaching project goals together. Combining clean architecture with AI agents, I deliver both quality and speed at a high level.

contact.title: Contact
